name: recon
description: Network and web reconnaissance starter commands.
author: nock

commands.name: nmap service/version scan
commands.description: Default scripts + version detection, output to scans/.
commands.intent: identify open ports and the service versions behind them

commands.name: nmap full TCP port sweep
commands.intent: find every open TCP port including non-standard ones

commands.name: gobuster directory brute force
commands.description: Brute force web content with a wordlist.
commands.intent: discover hidden web directories and files

commands.name: ffuf virtual host discovery
commands.description: Fuzz the Host header to find virtual hosts.
commands.intent: enumerate virtual hosts served by the target

commands.name: crackmapexec SMB enumeration
commands.description: Authenticate over SMB and list shares.
commands.intent: enumerate SMB shares with valid credentials
